code:
mut i = 1
mut count3 = 0
mut count5 = 0

while i <= 15
  count3 = count3 + 1
  count5 = count5 + 1

  let fizz = count3 == 3
  let buzz = count5 == 5

  if fizz
    count3 = 0
  end
  if buzz
    count5 = 0
  end

  if fizz and buzz
    println("FizzBuzz")
  else if fizz
    println("Fizz")
  else if buzz
    println("Buzz")
  else
    println("#{i}")
  end

  i = i + 1
end
